Giovanni Battista Tiepolo

24 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.

by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo
Italy · 1709–1725 · Pen and brown ink

by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo

Flight into Egypt: The Embarkment of the Holy Family
by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · c. 1735 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash over black chalk; framing lines in black chalk

by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo
Italy · 18th Century · 1730–1735 · Oil on canvas

by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo
Italy · 1735–1740 · Etching printed in black on paper

by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo
Italy · 1735–1740 · Pen and brown ink with brush and brown wash

by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo
Italy · 1735–1745 · Etching on paper

by Giovanni Battista Tiepolo
Italy, 18th century · 1739 · oil on canvas
